title: Mystic Seas
description: A mod that introduces mermaids, mermaid tails, and even some siren-related abilities!
body: ![Mermaid Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fmYbzjGG/images/ed0c5fa5a76f6441d04a63b26bb90175de944eb2.png) I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! Originally part of the Sacred Grove Mod in version 1.16.5, The Mermaids from that mod have been ported to 1.20.1, given their own seperate mod, and expanded upon! Now you can trade Prismarine Crystals with the different mermaids in order to obtain their scales, and craft your own Neptune's Favor and become a Mermaid yourself! Trade more Crystals with the Mermaids, and use their scales to customize the color of your tail with a Smithing Table and Prismarine Shards! You can even betray your fellow mermaids, by stealing their hearts to craft a String of Broken Hearts to trade to the Sea Witch to one of her scales to alter the look of your own! **Requires Geckolib, Curios and Kleiders Custom Renderer API**
